plugins.name: origin
plugins.description: Personal AI memory layer for Claude Code — MCP memory plus setup, briefing, capture, recall, distillation, review, forget, and handoff skills.

plugins.name: boule
plugins.description: Lean, research-backed multi-LLM council with debiased judging (position-swap, verbosity-norm, stake-free judge).

plugins.name: ultrapowers
plugins.description: Hand Claude Code a goal and walk away. ultrapowers plans it, builds it test-first, reviews every step, and hands back a branch you can trust. Built on and complements superpowers by Jesse Vincent (@obra); does not replace it.
